overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through autumn rice paddies, visiting a small Inari shrine, and continuing along a tree-lined path toward a Japanese village during golden hour.

scene_state.functional_zone: rice paddy field with wooden shelter

events.description: character moves from grassy area onto path through rice paddy

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass and rice paddies toward a distant shrine

notable_agents.action: field worker bending over to harvest crops with a basket

entered.detail: small rustic wooden structure with thatched roof at edge of field
flooded rice paddies with tall golden crops
trees with vibrant red and orange autumn foliage covering hills
small traditional wooden shrine visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide-open rice paddy field during golden hour, passing a wooden shelter on the left. Field workers are visible harvesting crops as the character approaches a distant shrine surrounded by autumn maple trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: small traditional Inari shrine with stone steps

events.description: entering the shrine area with stone steps and wooden structure
character bows respectfully at the shrine altar

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone steps to the shrine, bowing at the altar, then descending

notable_agents.action: villager standing at altar with hands clasped in prayer

entered.detail: traditional wooden shrine with curved roof and hanging shimenawa ropes
weathered stone steps leading up to the shrine platform
wooden altar with offerings and decorative items

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and enters the shrine area, climbing stone steps to reach the altar. An NPC villager stands praying at the shrine. The character bows respectfully at the altar before turning to leave.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined stone path leading to village

events.description: exiting shrine area onto stone pathway lined with pine trees
path curves slightly as character approaches village buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along a winding stone path shaded by pine trees toward a traditional village

notable_agents.action: villager walking along the path toward the character

entered.detail: winding dirt and stone path through the countryside
tall pine trees lining the path with rough bark texture
traditional Japanese wooden houses with tiled roofs
wooden torii-style gate marking village entrance

segments.scene_description: Leaving the shrine, the character walks along a stone path shaded by pine trees. Traditional village buildings become visible on the left as the path leads toward a wooden gate. Other villagers are seen walking along the path in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an expansive autumn rice paddy toward the sheltered entrance of a traditional Japanese village. It begins with the character traversing wide-open fields during the golden hour, passing a wooden shelter and harvesting workers as the camera tracks toward a distant shrine framed by red maple trees. As the character reaches the shrine, the scene shifts from the open landscape to a more intimate space, climbing stone steps to an altar where a villager prays. The camera then follows the character as they bow and depart, transitioning from the shrine's sanctuary onto a shaded stone path lined with towering pine trees. Finally, the environment opens up to reveal traditional village buildings and distant pedestrians as the path leads toward a wooden gate.
